questionHtml:
Oxidation and reduction reactions can have a variety of commercial uses.

Calculate the cell potential using section 24 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
«1.66 + (−0.14) = +»1.52 «V» ✓

 

Calculation must be consistent with equation given in 3 b.
